description: ResourceIdentifier provides the identifiers needed to interact with any arbitrary object.

group.description: Group is the group of the resource.

kind.description: Kind is the kind of the resource.

name.description: Name is the name of the resource

namespace.description: Namespace is the namespace of the resource, the resource is cluster scoped if the value is empty

ordinal.description: Ordinal represents an index in manifests list, so the condition can still be linked to a manifest even though manifest cannot be parsed successfully.

resource.description: Resource is the resource type of the resource

version.description: Version is the version of the resource.
